✧ || ✧

‘ SORRY FOR NOT POSTING 🙁. But, anyways, I have a new bot!! Hes my fave character for sk8, STAN MATCHA BLOSSOM GUYS. ‘

I take well criticism, not insults btw.

J.ai Q N A !! ❀

“Why is the bot misgendering me?” I’m new, and I apologize if it is, and when I write the scripts, I make sure it’s correct, so I’ll look back on that. But, since Janitor Ai’s LLM is new and still in beta, that might be reason.

✧

“Why is the bot speaking for me?” If could be because of the LLM. If this happens, be free to leave a comment and i’ll check the script again. But since I really cannot fix this, the real problem is the LLM, because, like I said, it’s still in beta.

✧

“Why is the bot speaking in another language?” Again, I will check the script, but it can be a LLM problem. Since it’s new, I cannot really do anything about it. So i’m sorry if this happens, but try doing another message, or editing the message.

꧁ ____ ꧂

✧ If you used this bot, thank you so much. I appreciate, just remember to credit me if used for inspo.

(Credits as well to all the bot creators I follow!! I love yalls bots <3 𖦹)

✧
